codex_general.label: General Codex Chat
codex_general.memory_policy: Codex solo Capsule is the minimum working context; Mini indexes receipts; long-horizon epochs and package selector decide older context; no hidden memory claims.
codex_general.purpose: Practical single-agent Codex lane using Capsule as minimum context, Mini as lookup index, explicit repo context, and pinned memory.

ion_system.memory_policy: ION state, proof-gated returns, receipts, and explicit promoted memory only.
